items.title: Rice porridge with homemade jam
items.description:
Rice porridge with homemade jam and apples covered in honey and cinnamon
Dear friends!
Due to supply disruptions, our packaging may differ from what you are used to seeing. For example, a package for porridge may not be 250 ml, but 500 ml. This may give the impression that we have prepared a dish for you of a smaller quantity than before. We assure you it's not. Weight is always the same.
:)
Allergens: lactose, honey, strawberry
